# opnsense_acme_certificate (Resource)
Manages an ACME certificate on OPNsense. Requires `os-acme-client`.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_acme_certificate" "web" {
  name              = "www.example.com"
  alt_names         = "example.com,api.example.com"
  account           = opnsense_acme_account.letsencrypt.id
  validation_method = opnsense_acme_challenge.http.id
  key_length        = "key_4096"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account` (String) UUID of the ACME account to use.
- `name` (String) Primary domain name (FQDN).
- `validation_method` (String) UUID of the challenge/validation method.

### Optional

- `alt_names` (String) Comma-separated Subject Alternative Names.
- `auto_renewal` (Boolean) Enable automatic renewal. Defaults to `true`.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this certificate is enabled.
- `key_length` (String) Key length: `key_2048`, `key_3072`, `key_4096`, `key_ec256`, `key_ec384`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_acme_certificate.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
